arts.ttl: Viktoria Plzen vs Manchester United live Europa League updates, team news and Ruben Amorim latest
arts.athr: newsdesk@men-news.co.uk (Samuel Luckhurst, Tyrone Marshall, Steven Railston)
arts.sum: Man Utd take on Viktoria Plzen in the Europa League this evening and we'll bring you live updates from the game.

arts.ttl: Free agent more likely to join Liverpool than Man United as star not attracted to Old Trafford transfer
arts.sum: Bayern Munich left-back Alphonso Davies is nearing the end of his contract and in just a few weeks’ time can start negotiating a free transfer abroad for next season. arts.ttl: Exclusive: Diego León to Manchester United – Expert view from Paraguay on teen sensation
arts.sum: Diego León has been at the centre of Manchester United transfer talk this week, with reports from Paraguay revealing the club have reached a deal to buy the 17-year-old left-back from Cerro Porteño. arts.ttl: The great Man United clearout: How much each Red Devils player is worth as Ruben Amorim is told he must SELL in the January transfer window to avoid PSR issues - with only a handful of stars safe from Ineos cull
arts.sum: The Portuguese boss has rotated his starting XI on a regular basis in his opening weeks, indicating that he is not convinced by the current group of Man United players.

arts.ttl: Man United urged to sign Premier League star to help Ruben Amorim fix problem position
arts.sum: United States international Antonee Robinson has been one of the most consistent left-backs in the Premier League since Fulham returned to the top-flight before the 2022/2023 season.

arts.ttl: Sheikh Jassim 'monitoring' Man Utd despite snub as Sir Jim Ratcliffe's problems escalate
arts.sum: Sheikh Jassim lost the race to buy a stake in Manchester United to Sir Jim Ratcliffe but is watching with interest as the British billionaire faces increasing problems

arts.ttl: Man United ace’s fall from grace complete as Red Devils don’t expect any bids for £40m-rated international
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford’s stock as an elite player is now so low that Man United aren’t expecting any bids for the player in January despite putting him up for sale.
